snippet.title: 28 PARENTING HACKS From Crafty Moms And Dads || Tips for Being Friends with Your Child
snippet.description:
Tips and tricks every parent will be thankful for. 

Being a parent isn‚Äôt an easy task, and most of the time, parents come across more problems than they can solve. Well, to help you out, I wanted to share with you some amazing hacks that will save you time and the hassle that comes with taking care of a little one. Painting is everyone‚Äôs favorite activity, but it can be very messy ‚ÄĒ and clothes get destroyed. So, to keep your little one‚Äôs outfit nice and clean, use a plastic bag as an apron for them. Toddlers tend to drop their pacifiers all the time, and once the pacifier is down, it needs to be cleaned. To prevent that from happening, tie the pacifier on a balloon. You can use a closet organizer and label it for each day of the week to make sure that picking outfits for the day won‚Äôt take hours. Watch until the end to discover all the genius parenting hacks you need to know. 

Timestamps: 

0:31 ‚ÄĒ The pacifier hack 

2:42 ‚ÄĒ A little water, pepper, and soap experiment 

5:32 ‚ÄĒ The getting along/best friends‚Äô shirt 

7:20 ‚ÄĒ Face mask too big? Try this hack 

8:58 ‚ÄĒ Tasty gummy bear lollies

Any action you take upon the information on this video is strictly at your own risk, and we will not be liable for any damages or losses. snippet.title: KROFNE IZ RERNE!  Ne postoji lepŇ°i recept bez prŇĺenja! Punjene, mekane kao pamuk.Ukus pravih krofni.
snippet.description:
Recept za krofne koji neńáete menjati. Prosto su savrŇ°ene!
#bezprŇĺenja #krofne #izrerne
serpica krofne
serpica recept za krofne
serpica recepti
Recept na blogu: http://www.serpica.net/2021/01/krofne-iz-rerne-mekane-i-ukusne-bez.html

Sastojci i priprema:

- pola kocke kvasca (30 gr. ili kaŇ°ińćica suvog kvasca)

- 200 ml. mleka (moŇĺe i voda)

- 2 kesice vanilin Ň°eńáera moŇĺe i aroma

- 50 gr. Ň°eńáera

- 2 jajeta

- 50 ml. ulja

IzmeŇ°ati sve i zamesiti sa 500-600gr. mekog, belog braŇ°na, kada ste dodali braŇ°no ne zaboravite staviti i pola kaŇ°ińćice soli.

Dobro zameŇ°eno testo prekriti i ostaviti na toplom da nadońĎe. Posle pola sata ili sat vremena premesite, razvucite oklagijom i vadite veńáom ńćaŇ°om ili modlom kolutove.

Na jedan deo kolutova prstima pritiskajuńái napravite malo udubljenje. Tu stavite fil koji Ňĺelite, rubove testa premaŇĺite vodom pa preklopite drugim delom testa. Pritisnite prstima oko krofne da se delovi spoje i potom opet modlom izvadite obruńć krofne da bi dobili lep oblik. MoŇĺete pogledati video.

SlaŇĺite u tespsiju sa pek papirom, premaŇĺite krofne sa umuńáenim jajetom i ostavite da stoje od 15 - 20 minuta da malo nadońĎu. Peku se na 180 stepeni oko 30 minuta, zavisi od rerne uglavnom treba da fino porumene. Krofne uvalajte u prah Ň°eńáer i uŇĺivajte. Prijatno!

Recept na blogu: http://www.serpica.net/2021/01/krofne-iz-rerne-mekane-i-ukusne-bez.html

Sastojci i priprema:

- pola kocke kvasca (30 gr. ili kaŇ°ińćica suvog kvasca)

- 200 ml. mleka (moŇĺe i voda)

- 2 kesice vanilin Ň°eńáera moŇĺe i aroma

- 50 gr. Ň°eńáera

- 2 jajeta

- 50 ml. ulja

IzmeŇ°ati sve i zamesiti sa 500-600gr. mekog, belog braŇ°na, kada ste dodali braŇ°no ne zaboravite staviti i pola kaŇ°ińćice soli.

Dobro zameŇ°eno testo prekriti i ostaviti na toplom da nadońĎe. Posle pola sata ili sat vremena premesite, razvucite oklagijom i vadite veńáom ńćaŇ°om ili modlom kolutove.

Na jedan deo kolutova prstima pritiskajuńái napravite malo udubljenje. Tu stavite fil koji Ňĺelite, rubove testa premaŇĺite vodom pa preklopite drugim delom testa. Pritisnite prstima oko krofne da se delovi spoje i potom opet modlom izvadite obruńć krofne da bi dobili lep oblik. MoŇĺete pogledati video.

SlaŇĺite u tespsiju sa pek papirom, premaŇĺite krofne sa umuńáenim jajetom i ostavite da stoje od 15 - 20 minuta da malo nadońĎu. Peku se na 180 stepeni oko 30 minuta, zavisi od rerne uglavnom treba da fino porumene. Krofne uvalajte u prah Ň°eńáer i uŇĺivajte. Prijatno!

snippet.title: Kuńáa od srca S07, porodica Stanńćulj 02. PINK 07.02. 12h premijerna epizoda Stanńćulj 03
snippet.description: Projekat "Kuńáa od srca" ima za cilj zbrinjavanje najugroŇĺenijih porodica na teritoriji Republike Srbije. Ministarstvo rada i socijalne politike prepoznalo je zajednińćke ciljeve i prikljuńćilo se projektu ‚ÄĚ Kuńáa od srca ‚ÄĚ u pomońái pri zadovoljavanju osnovnih potreba ugroŇĺenih porodica. Porodice koje su deo projekta ‚ÄĚ Kuńáa od srca ‚ÄĚ uz podrŇ°ku Ministarstva rada i socijalne politike imaju priliku da budu stambeno zbrinute, materijalno potpomognute, vrańáene u obrazovni sistem Ň°to rezultira resocijalizacijom svih ńćlanova porodice uz akcentovanje na najmlańĎe ńćlanove druŇ°tva. Osnovna ideja projekta ‚ÄĚ Kuńáa od srca ‚ÄĚ jeste ukljuńćivanje celokupne zajednice u pomońá porodicama koje su od strane Ministarstva proglaŇ°ene najugroŇĺenijim. Ono Ň°to izdvaja serijal ‚ÄúKuńáa od srca‚ÄĚ, jeste ńćinjenica da je to prvi domańái rijaliti, koji se pored reŇ°avanja stambenog pitanja kroz grańĎevinske radove, bavi i reŇ°avanjem porodińćnih i meńĎuljudskih odnosa. Pravila serijala su jasno definisana i glase: 1. Izgradnja kuńáe po projektu traje 31dan i ukoliko nije gotova serijal tu zavrŇ°ava, objekat ostaje u zateńćenom stanju, sa porukom da se zajedniica ukljuńći I pomogne u zavrŇ°etku radova. 2. Da imaju imovinu najbliŇĺih koji su spremni da je ustupe za izgradnju Kuńáe od srca . 3. NajbliŇĺi ńćlanovi porodice, prijatelji I komŇ°ije moraju imati pozitivno miŇ°ljenje o izabranoj porodici. 4. Punoletni ńćlanovi izabrane porodice moraju biti druŇ°tveno odgovorni : da nisu uŇĺivaoci alkohala, droge kao I da nisu skloni nasilju, a imaju izraŇĺenu crtu o brizi za decu. Ukoliko bilo koji ńćlan porodice koji je uńćesnik serijala prekrŇ°i bilo koje pravilo, serijal se prekida istog trenutka kao I sama gradnja.

snippet.title: Godzilla vs. Kong ‚Äď Official Trailer
snippet.description:
In theaters and streaming exclusively on @HBOMax* March 26.
¬†
*Available on @HBOMax in the US only, for 31 days, at no extra cost to subscribers.

https://www.godzillavskong.com/
https://www.facebook.com/GodzillaVsKong
https://www.instagram.com/godzillavskong/
https://twitter.com/GodzillaVsKong

---

From Warner Bros. Pictures and Legendary Pictures comes the long-awaited face-off between two icons, ‚ÄúGodzilla vs. Kong,‚ÄĚ the next epic adventure in Legendary‚Äôs cinematic Monsterverse, directed by Adam Wingard.

Legends collide in ‚ÄúGodzilla vs. Kong‚ÄĚ as these mythic adversaries meet in a spectacular battle for the ages, with the fate of the world hanging in the balance.  Kong and his protectors undertake a perilous journey to find his true home, and with them is Jia, a young orphaned girl with whom he has formed a unique and powerful bond.  But they unexpectedly find themselves in the path of an enraged Godzilla, cutting a swath of destruction across the globe.  The epic clash between the two titans‚ÄĒinstigated by unseen forces‚ÄĒis only the beginning of the mystery that lies deep within the core of the Earth.

The film stars Alexander Skarsg√•rd (‚ÄúBig Little Lies,‚ÄĚ ‚ÄúThe Little Drummer Girl‚ÄĚ), Millie Bobby Brown (‚ÄúStranger Things‚ÄĚ), Rebecca Hall (‚ÄúChristine,‚ÄĚ ‚ÄúProfessor Marston and the Wonder Women‚ÄĚ), Brian Tyree Henry (‚ÄúJoker,‚ÄĚ ‚ÄúSpider-Man: Into the Spider-Verse‚ÄĚ), Shun Oguri (‚ÄúWeathering with You‚ÄĚ), Eiza Gonz√°lez (‚ÄúFast & Furious Presents: Hobbs & Shaw‚ÄĚ), Julian Dennison (‚ÄúDeadpool 2‚ÄĚ), with Kyle Chandler (‚ÄúGodzilla: King of the Monsters‚ÄĚ) and Demi√°n Bichir (‚ÄúThe Nun,‚ÄĚ ‚ÄúThe Hateful Eight‚ÄĚ).
Wingard (‚ÄúThe Guest,‚ÄĚ ‚ÄúYou‚Äôre Next‚ÄĚ) directed from a screenplay by Eric Pearson (‚ÄúThor: Ragnarok‚ÄĚ) and Max Borenstein (‚ÄúGodzilla: King of the Monsters,‚ÄĚ ‚ÄúKong: Skull Island‚ÄĚ), story by Terry Rossio (‚ÄúPirates of the Caribbean: Dead Men Tell No Tales‚ÄĚ) and Michael Dougherty & Zach Shields (‚ÄúGodzilla: King of the Monsters‚ÄĚ), based on the character ‚ÄúGodzilla‚ÄĚ owned and created by TOHO CO., LTD.  The film was produced by Mary Parent, Alex Garcia, Eric McLeod, Jon Jashni, Thomas Tull and Brian Rogers, with Jay Ashenfelter, Herbert W. Gains, Dan Lin, Roy Lee, Yoshimitsu Banno and Kenji Okuhira executive producing.

The director‚Äôs behind-the-scenes creative team included director of photography Ben Seresin (‚ÄúThe Mummy,‚ÄĚ ‚ÄúWorld War Z‚ÄĚ), production designers Owen Paterson (‚ÄúJumanji: Welcome to the Jungle,‚ÄĚ ‚ÄúGodzilla‚ÄĚ) and Thomas S. Hammock (‚ÄúBlair Witch‚ÄĚ), editor Josh Schaeffer (‚ÄúGodzilla: King of the Monsters‚ÄĚ), costume designer Ann Foley (‚ÄúSkyscraper‚ÄĚ) and visual effects supervisor John ‚ÄúDJ‚ÄĚ DesJardin (upcoming ‚ÄúZack Snyder‚Äôs Justice League‚ÄĚ).

Warner Bros. Pictures and Legendary Pictures Present a Legendary Pictures Production, A Film By Adam Wingard, ‚ÄúGodzilla vs. Kong.‚ÄĚ  The film will be released nationwide in 2D and 3D in select theaters and IMAX on March 26, 2021 and will be available in the U.S. on HBO Max for 31 days from theatrical release.  It is rated PG-13 for intense sequences of creature violence/destruction and brief language.

snippet.title: Brzi kokos kolańći bez peńćenja! Jako nam se svińĎaju.  Ukusno i dekorativno!
snippet.description:
Svi smo oduŇ°evljeni ovim kolańćińáima. Tako su jednostavni za napraviti a rezultat, puno dekorativnih i ukusnih zalogaja. UŇĺivajte! Podelite recept sa vaŇ°im prijateljima.
#kokoskolac #bezpecenja #brzikolaci
serpica kolaci
serpica recepti
nepeceni kolaci
Recept na blogu:http://www.serpica.net/2021/01/brzi-kokos-kolaci.html

 - 200 ml. vode

- 150 gr. Ň°eńáera

- 200 gr. maslaca ili margarina

- 200 gr. mleka u prahu

- 200 gr. kokosa

- 4 kaŇ°ike mlevenog keksa

- 1 kaŇ°ika kakaa

- 100 gr. bele ńćokolade

- 100 gr. crne ńćokolade

- papir za peńćenje ili folija



Prokuvajte Ň°ecer, vodu i maslac. Sklonite sa ringle i brzo umeŇ°ajte mleko u prahu i kokos. Dodajte keks i dobro izmeŇ°ajte (moŇĺete i rukom) testo podelite na dva dela.

U jedan stavite kakao i 100 gr. rastopljene crne ńćokolade a u drugi 100 gr. rastopljene bele ńćokolade.

Ostavite da se smese ohlade(ne da se stegnu), razvucite na pek papiru beli deo uz pomońá oklagije, na drugom pek papiru razvucite tamni deo i potom preklopite testa jedno preko drugog. PreńĎite oklagijom da se delovi spoje. Secite trake Ň°irine oko 1 cm. urolajte i uvrnite da se naprave Ň°are (moŇĺete pogledati u videu). Secite manje komade i uvaljajte u kokos. Ostavite kolańće u friŇĺideru da se stegnu. Prijatno!

localized.title: Brzi kokos kolańći bez peńćenja! Jako nam se svińĎaju.  Ukusno i dekorativno!
localized.description:
Svi smo oduŇ°evljeni ovim kolańćińáima. Tako su jednostavni za napraviti a rezultat, puno dekorativnih i ukusnih zalogaja. UŇĺivajte! Podelite recept sa vaŇ°im prijateljima.
#kokoskolac #bezpecenja #brzikolaci
serpica kolaci
serpica recepti
nepeceni kolaci
Recept na blogu:http://www.serpica.net/2021/01/brzi-kokos-kolaci.html

 - 200 ml. vode

- 150 gr. Ň°eńáera

- 200 gr. maslaca ili margarina

- 200 gr. mleka u prahu

- 200 gr. kokosa

- 4 kaŇ°ike mlevenog keksa

- 1 kaŇ°ika kakaa

- 100 gr. bele ńćokolade

- 100 gr. crne ńćokolade

- papir za peńćenje ili folija



Prokuvajte Ň°ecer, vodu i maslac. Sklonite sa ringle i brzo umeŇ°ajte mleko u prahu i kokos. Dodajte keks i dobro izmeŇ°ajte (moŇĺete i rukom) testo podelite na dva dela.

U jedan stavite kakao i 100 gr. rastopljene crne ńćokolade a u drugi 100 gr. rastopljene bele ńćokolade.

Ostavite da se smese ohlade(ne da se stegnu), razvucite na pek papiru beli deo uz pomońá oklagije, na drugom pek papiru razvucite tamni deo i potom preklopite testa jedno preko drugog. PreńĎite oklagijom da se delovi spoje. Secite trake Ň°irine oko 1 cm. urolajte i uvrnite da se naprave Ň°are (moŇĺete pogledati u videu). Secite manje komade i uvaljajte u kokos. Ostavite kolańće u friŇĺideru da se stegnu. Prijatno!

snippet.title: Mamine fasirane snicle :) kako ih je ona pravila :) da li je i vasa Mama pravila ovako ili drugacije
snippet.description:
#maminefasiranesnicle  #starirecept  #socneimekesnicle

12 komada 
1 kg mlevenog mesanog mesa 
veca glavica luka 200g
4 cena bjelog luka
1 semela ili deblja kriska bjelog kruha
1 kaskica i jednu pola kaskice soli
skoro pola kaskice bibera crnog

Hvala vam svima na svemu budite zdravi i srecni , ljubimo puno :****

snippet.title: TV lica ... kao sav normalan svet: In memoriam Mira Furlan

snippet.title: Merceds-Benz S-Class - TEST NA STAZI NAVAK
snippet.description:
Svaka ‚ÄěS-klasa‚Äú je oduvek bila simbol luksuza, visokih performansi, komfora i bezbednosti, a kao takva i statusni simbol. Ujedno, kao ‚Äědomańái zadatak‚Äú za konkurenciju, predstavljala je i simbol dostignuńáa automobilske industrije, jer je retko kada i retko u kom polju neki konkurent bio bolji; moŇĺda samo u poslednjim godinama proizvodnje, neposredno pred pojavu naslednika. 
Novoj generaciji breme odgovornosti nije niŇ°ta manje teŇ°ko nego Ň°to je to bilo svim njenim prethodnicima, jer se i od danaŇ°nje Mercedesove najluksuznije limuzine ońćekuje da postavlja standarde komfora, luksuza, bezbednosti i dizajna.
Testirali smo je na stazi u centru NAVAK.

snippet.title: OPTUŇĹNICE SPREMNE, KREńÜU HAPŇ†ENJA: Duboka drŇĺava nije pobedila joŇ° uvek, sve se deŇ°ava iza kulisa!
snippet.description:
Gost na YouTube kanalu "Nauka i Misterije Balkan" bio je Danko Vasovińá, novinar i pisac ńćiji su rad mnogi Ňĺeleli da zabrane da istina ne bi izaŇ°la na videlo. Preporuńćujemo Vam da pogledate celu emisiju i saznate viŇ°e o brojnim zanimljivim temama.

Emisiju je vodio novinar TeŇ°a TeŇ°anovińá.

*************************************************************

Zabranjeno je svako preuzimanje snimaka i objavljivanje na drugim YouTube kanalima. Svi duplikati ńáe biti uklanjani u skladu sa YouTube pravilima. Iz ovoga ńáe biti izuzeti samo oni koji dobiju specijalnu dozvolu od vlasnika autorskih prava.

Autorska prava: "BALKAN INFO - Zvanińćni kanal"
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCLG5Qu54Q7gywaCeDs5etuQ

*************************************************************

Svi koji verno prate emisije i Ňĺele da pomognu rad naŇ°e produkcije to mogu uńćiniti iz Srbije i iz inostranstva. Trudińáemo se da ostanemo dosledni naŇ°oj ideji o slobodnom novinarstvu i Ň°irenju istine bez cenzure.

*************************************************************

BALKAN INFO je nezavisna medijska produkcija osnovana u junu 2015. godine u Beogradu. Prepoznati smo kao glas svih koji ne Ňĺele da budu deo kratkotrajnih projekata i saveza, svih onih koji poŇ°tuju srpske tradicionalne vrednosti i koji ńćuvaju seńáanje na naŇ°e slavne pretke.

Lyrics:

Ooh
Na na, yeah
I saw you dancing in a crowded room
You look so happy when I'm not with you
But then you saw me, caught you by surprise
A single teardrop falling from your eye
I don't know why I run away
I make you cry when I run away
You could've asked me why I broke your heart
You could've told me that you fell apart
But you walked past me like I wasn't there
And just pretended like you didn't care
I don't know why I run away
I make you cry when I run away
Take me back 'cause I wanna stay
Save your tears for another
Save your tears for another day
Save your tears for another day
So
I made you think that I would always stay
I said some things that I should never say
Yeah, I broke your heart like someone did to mine
And now you won't love me for a second time
I don't know why I run away, oh, girl
Said I make you cry when I run away
Girl, take me back 'cause I wanna stay
Save your tears for another
I realize that I'm much too late
And you deserve someone better
Save your tears for another day (Ooh, yeah)
Save your tears for another day (Yeah)
I don't know why I run away
I make you cry when I run away
Save your tears for another day, ooh, girl (Ah)
I said save your tears for another day (Ah)
Save your tears for another day (Ah)
Save your tears for another day (Ah)

snippet.title: Emanet 103. B√∂l√ľm FragmanńĪ | Legacy Episode 103 Promo (English & Spanish subs)
snippet.description:
Abone Ol / Subscribe: https://bit.ly/2TLyNnG
Yaman KńĪrńĪmlńĪ is a successful and young businessman who had a rough childhood but never gave up, on the contrary he even became stronger with every obstacle. He started his life from the bottom and became very wealthy. All he has in his world, is a family that he has to take care of after his father‚Äôs death. He closed his heart to all romantic feelings a long time ago and his only weakness is his 5-year old nephew‚Ä¶ Little Yusuf is very well protected under his uncle‚Äôs arms, but he craves loves and sympathy. The only happy image in his mind is his aunt Seher. 
 
Seher is a beautiful and humble girl living with her grandfather. Her life is shaken by the death of her sister who was the bride of the KńĪrńĪmlńĪ family. From now on, she has a legacy she has to take care at all costs: Her little nephew Yusuf. This adventure will arise the long hidden secrets of the KńĪrńĪmlńĪ mansion; while a whole another legacy will start to grow in Seher and Yaman's hearts. 

#Legacy
#Emanet
#SehYam
